The pack of 60 balloons ensures that you have enough balloons to decorate your party venue. You can also mix and match the colors to create unique color combinations that match your party's theme.

The Rainbow Set of 12 Inch balloons comes in assorted bright colors that can make any party come alive. Whether it's a birthday party, baby shower, or any other special occasion, these balloons are sure to add color and excitement to the event.
Colored balloons are the best party accessory for all ages, blow them up with either your mouth, pump or helium
